title: Stolen Death
writer: Erik Blomberg, Matti Kurjensaari, Eino Mäkinen
actors: Tuulikki Paananen, Ilmari Mänty, Santeri Karilo
plot: A thriller set in turn-of-the-century Helsinki, Stolen Death uses elements of German expressionism to tell the story of Finnish resistance fighters smuggling arms to overthrow the Tsarist occupiers of Finland. Tapiovaara stresses ...
